description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds a Kobo kernel. The workflow should trigger on workflow dispatch, push to specific paths in the master branch, and on pull requests to those paths. It should use a matrix strategy to build the kernel for different models (mini, glohd, aura2) with specific toolchains and configurations. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment, check out the repository, install dependencies, cache downloads and ccache, install the toolchain, build the kernel, and upload the resulting uImage as an artifact.
